Jia Ji Ë≥àÁí£
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Jia Ji (Ë≥àÁí£). Another son of Jia Xu, moved to Changle. Jia Ji may not have existed in history. Jia Ji was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
